tables: http is the default request type; https is also available.
Request domain to access the Sports Data API. For most clients, this is the default: api.performfeeds.com Use the defaul
Resource of the Sports Data API. In this case, the Golf API: golfdata
Feed name of the resource in the Golf API. For example: squads
Outlet Authentication Key . A unique 26-character alphanumeric UUID which is unique to each outlet. Any requests made wi
Query parameters . There are required and optional parameters. Optional parameters can help you to search the feed and c
Tournament (MA1) Tournament (MA1) Get details of tournaments, such as start and end date, round information, competition
Leaderboard (MA2) Leaderboard (MA2) Get detailed Leaderboard information for teams and each of the individual players
Hole by Hole (MA3) Hole by Hole (MA3) Get scores for each golfer for each individual hole and round of the tournament
Match Play (MA11) Match Play (MA11) Get scores for all golfers on each individual match play of the tournament
Tour Calendars (OT2) Tour Calendars (OT2) Get information for different golf tour calendars, such as dates and IDs, grou
Player Career Feed (PE2) Player Career Feed (PE2) Get information about the current and past memberships of players and
Rankings (TM2) Rankings (TM2) Get the latest rankings for a specific date
